# 🧠 Example: Anomaly Detection in Network Traffic Data

This example reproduces the full experimental workflow:
1. Dataset loading & EDA
2. Preprocessing & feature selection
3. Supervised models (RF, XGB)
4. Evaluation & visualization

| Model | ROC-AUC | PR-AUC |
|--------|----------|---------|
| RandomForest | TBD | TBD |
| XGBoost | TBD | TBD |

## Insights
- XGBoost generally achieved higher recall on minority classes.
- Mutual Information + EFS effectively reduced feature space.
- Next steps: Unsupervised models (Isolation Forest, LOF).
